ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol representing the component */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter being tested */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unit of measurement for the parameter */,
  "component_type" TEXT /* Type of the component (e.g., transistor, diode, IC) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the component */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Unique part number assigned by the manufacturer */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the component was added to the system */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test condition */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component being tested */,
  "test_description" TEXT /* Description of the test conditions */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was conducted */,
  "test_operator" TEXT /* Name or ID of the operator who conducted the test */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environmental conditions under which the test was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_conditions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component being tested */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific test condition */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value recorded during the test */,
  "typ_value" REAL /* Typical value recorded during the test */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value recorded during the test */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was conducted */,
  "test_operator" TEXT /* Name or ID of the operator who conducted the test */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environmental conditions under which the test was conducted */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or observations made during the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES test_conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit of measurement (e.g., V, mA) */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component in the inventory */,
  "quantity_available" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component available for testing */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the component in the inventory */,
  "last_stock_check" TEXT /* Date of the last stock check */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the component (e.g., available, under test, defective) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)
